user.title: Select integration mode
user.description: ZTP Kraków allows tracking departures from a stop or vehicles on a map.

data.mode: What do you want to do?

stop.title: Select Stop
stop.description: Select your stop from the dropdown list. If the list failed to load, enter the ID manually.

data.manual_stop_id: OR enter ID manually (if list is empty)

line_filter.title: Select line (Optional)
line_filter.description: You can track all lines (Select "Wszystkie") or restrict results to a specific line.

direction.title: Select direction (Optional)
direction.description: For the selected line, you can further restrict results to a single direction.

line.title: Select Line
line.description: Enter the line number (e.g. 192). All vehicles on this route will be added to the map.

error.missing_stop_id: You must select a stop or enter its ID manually
error.cannot_connect_stops: Could not fetch stops list (API might be down). Please enter ID manually.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to TTSS API

abort.already_configured: This stop with this filter is already configured
